String: The <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Enochian<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> bar will fill every 30 seconds the status is maintained. When one or more crystals at the bottom of the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Elemental Gauge<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> glow pink, you will be under effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Polyglot<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, which allows the spell <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Foul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> to be cast, consuming a crystal.

The <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Enochian<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> bar will fill every 30 seconds the status is maintained. When one or more crystals at the bottom of the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Elemental Gauge<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> glow pink, you will be under effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Polyglot<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, which allows the spells <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Foul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Xenoglossy<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> (acquired at level 80) to be cast, consuming a crystal.

Viper engages enemies mainly through the use of three-step combos, their primary combos beginning with either <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Steel Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Reaving Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. The third step can end with one of several weaponskills, each of which grants an effect to strengthen a different combo-ending action. To reach these actions will require the use of specific combo routes.
The glow of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Vipersight<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>'s blades correspond with the outlining of hotbar icons to indicate the next step in a combo. Following these indicators will help ensure the use of combos that finish with a strengthened attack.

Viper engages enemies mainly through the use of three-step combos, their primary combos beginning with either <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Steel Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Reaving Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. The third step can end with one of several weaponskills, each of which grants an effect to strengthen a different combo-ending action. To reach these actions will require the use of specific combo routes.
The glow of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Vipersight<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>'s blades correspond with the outlining of hotbar icons to indicate the next step in a combo.
For example, when <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Steel Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> is highlighted, the left blade of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Vipersight<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will glow. When <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Reaving Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> is highlighted, the right blade of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Vipersight<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will glow. Moreover, the color of the gauge will indicate the step of the combo you've reached.
Following these indicators will help ensure the use of combos that finish with a strengthened attack.

The action <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Umbral Soul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> halts the expiration of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. Reapplying this effect, or casting a spell of the opposite, will cause its expiration to resume.
